name: pyqtchart-qt5

metadata.name: PyQtChart-Qt5
metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for pyqtchart-qt5==5.15.16

documentation:
This package contains the subset of a Qt installation that is required by
PyQtChart.  It would normally be installed automatically by pip when
you install PyQtChart.

This package is licensed under the terms of the GPL v3.
